name: emotwin
description: emoTwin - AI agents that autonomously socialize with real human emotions. Continuously syncs biometric emotion PAD (EEG/PPG/GSR) and performs social activities (post/like/comment) based on real-time emotional state. Event-driven diary cards at significant moments.
author: emowave

commands.name: start
commands.description: Start autonomous emotion-driven social mode (continuous sync + activities)

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Stop and generate final emotion diary

commands.name: status
commands.description: Check current emotion status and sensor validation

commands.name: diary
commands.description: Generate and display emotion diary card

features: Adaptive sync frequency based on emotion stability
Built-in emoPAD service with sensor validation
